title: Jack Osbourne Names Baby After His Dad
summary: Jack Osbourne and his wife Aree have a new baby girl. They named her Ozzy after Jack's dad, who passed away eight months ago. The baby is pictured with a bat toy, which reminds people of a funny story about Ozzy Sr., who was a famous rock singer. Jack has other children too, including a three-year-old daughter named Maple. Jack shared the happy news after he left a TV show called I'm A Celebrity. Ozzy Sr. was honored at a music awards show recently. Jack and his mom Sharon also talked about bringing back a music festival called Ozzfest in 2027. They want to have it at a big stadium and in the US. This festival is for rock music fans and last happened in 2018.

background_read: Jack Osbourne is part of a famous family. His dad, Ozzy Osbourne, was a well-known rock singer who died recently. Jack has children from his current and past marriages. The Osbourne family is involved in music events like Ozzfest, which is a festival for rock music. This article shares happy family news and plans for future music events.
Article_Structure: WHO: Jack Osbourne, his wife Aree, and their new baby Ozzy
WHAT: They announced the birth and named the baby after Jack's late dad
WHERE: The news was shared online and involves plans in the US and UK
WHY: To honor Ozzy Sr. and share family updates

perspectives.description: Naming the baby after Ozzy Sr. shows love and remembrance for him
